title: unexpected overflow error during insert into the partition table
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->
``` SQL
create table tb (s char(10), b bit(48), bb blob(6)) partition by hash (b) partitions 16;
insert into tb values ('\0\b\n\r\t\Z', _binary '\0\b\n\r\t\Z', unhex('00080A0D091A'));
```

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)

MySQL:
``` sql
mysql> create table tb (s char(10), b bit(48), bb blob(6)) partition by hash (b) partitions 16;
Query OK, 0 rows affected (0.11 sec)

mysql> insert into tb values ('\0\b\n\r\t\Z', _binary '\0\b\n\r\t\Z', unhex('00080A0D091A'));
Query OK, 1 row affected (0.03 sec)

mysql> select * from tb;
+--------+----------------+----------------+
| s      | b              | bb             |
+--------+----------------+----------------+
|
	 | 0x00080A0D091A | 0x00080A0D091A |
+--------+----------------+----------------+
1 row in set (0.01 sec)
```

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)

``` SQL
mysql> create table tb (s char(10), b bit(48), bb blob(6)) partition by hash (b) partitions 16;
Query OK, 0 rows affected (0.04 sec)

mysql> insert into tb values ('\0\b\n\r\t\Z', _binary '\0\b\n\r\t\Z', unhex('00080A0D091A'));
ERROR 1690 (22003): constant 34528364826 overflows int
```

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)
master
<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->
poc: create table tb (s char(10), b bit(48), bb blob(6)) partition by hash (b) partitions 16;
key_bug_features: insert into partition table with overflow error
bug_feature_seed: CREATE TABLE tb (s CHAR(10), b BIT(48), bb BLOB(6)) PARTITION BY HASH (b) PARTITIONS 16;
INSERT INTO tb VALUES ('mid1', _binary UNHEX('00080A0D091A'), UNHEX('00080A0D091A'));
INSERT INTO tb VALUES ('mid2', _binary UNHEX('7FFFFFFFFFFF'), UNHEX('7FFFFFFFFFFF'));
INSERT INTO tb VALUES ('cast1', CAST(_binary UNHEX('00080A0D091A') AS BINARY(6)), UNHEX('00080A0D091A'));
INSERT INTO tb SELECT 'subq', b, bb FROM tb WHERE b IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1;
INSERT INTO tb SELECT 'dup', b, bb FROM tb ORDER BY b DESC LIMIT 1;
INSERT INTO tb VALUES ('edge1', _binary UNHEX('800000000000'), UNHEX('800000000000'));
INSERT INTO tb VALUES ('edge2', _binary UNHEX('000000000000'), UNHEX('000000000000'));
